observed_anomaly_cues: Surface irregularity consistent with knot or insect
Visual pattern suggesting hole in wood surface
Localized deviation from normal wood appearance
mechanism_explanation: Natural wood knots or insect boring creates holes in the surface.
severity_visual_description: moderate hole in wood surface visible under inspection lighting
corrective_action: Improve raw material inspection and storage conditions.
counterfactual_prediction: After correction, the hole in wood surface would be absent and surface appears normal.
